titles.title: はるつげうおとふうらいぼう

data.title: Harutsugeuo to Fuuraibou
title_synonyms: はるつげうおとふうらいぼう
data.synopsis:
A little covetous breeze makes a pretty melody blowing in the wind. The story of a mysterious journey of tiny creatures intertwine through the hommono wilderness.

(Source: Tecarat)

data.title: Natsumatsuri
data.synopsis:
A girl moves to a certain town and goes to a summer festival in the neighborhood with her grandmother. As she was excited by the lively people and the unfamiliar food stalls, she suddenly lost sight of her grandmother.

(Source: Au Praxinoscope, translated)

Soreike! Anpanman: Christmas da! Minna Atsumare

それいけ！アンパンマン うたとおはなしすてきなクリスマス
それいけ！アンパンマン クリスマスだ！みんな集まれ

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Christmas da! Minna Atsumare
data.title_japanese: それいけ！アンパンマン クリスマスだ！みんな集まれ
title_synonyms: Soreike! Anpanman: Christmas da! Minna Atsumare
Sore Ike! Anpanman: Uta to Ohanashi - Suteki na Christmas
それいけ！アンパンマン うたとおはなしすてきなクリスマス
data.synopsis: Christmas has come again, and Anpanman and his friends have all gathered to prepare for some kind of grand effort, but Baikinman, without even knowing the details, will do everything he can to get in the way!
data.background: This Christmas story was released in the collection Sore Ike! Anpanman: Uta to Ohanashi - Suteki na Christmas, as a double feature with the home video release of the Anpanman TV anime's 1994 Christmas episode.

data.synopsis: Music video for the song Bring Me by Lanndo.

titles.title: 妻を同窓会にいかせたら

data.title: Tsuma wo Dousoukai ni Ikasetara
data.title_japanese: 妻を同窓会にいかせたら
data.synopsis: Yuri, a married woman, attends a class reunion despite her husband's concerns. There, she reunites with her ex-boyfriend Tatsuhiko. While Tatsuhiko continues to drink and show romantic interest in Yuri, she worries about his well-being due to his careless behavior and lack of alcohol control. Despite her concern, Yuri accompanies him to the bathroom when he feels unwell, but Tatsuhiko takes the opportunity to try to seduce her. Tatsuhiko had been pretending to be drunk to be alone with Yuri.
